response.justification: Strong full-stack engineer with 13+ years of experience well exceeding the 6+ year requirement. Current role at re:cinq directly involves TypeScript, Node.js, and AI-agent infrastructure including MCP code generators, matching the AI agent development requirement. Solid background across the required stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB), polyglot experience (Java, DLang, C++, Python-adjacent), and demonstrated craftsmanship via TDD, CI/CD, and teaching/workshops. Gaps include no explicit Nest.js or Vitest mention, and limited recent Kotlin exposure, but the foundation is strong enough that these are likely quick ramp-ups.
strengths: 13+ years full-stack experience with TypeScript/Node.js/React/MongoDB matching primary stack
Direct AI agent and MCP framework development experience at current role
Demonstrated software craftsmanship: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, plus teaching workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in resume
Vitest not listed; testing experience is general rather than framework-specific
Limited recent Kotlin/Java backend work for the secondary stack requirement
